requirement_topic.en: BSMD Standards Screening and IEC 62109 Safety Evidence

summary.en: Bahrain's standards body, the Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) within the Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC), adopts Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) standards issued by the GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) or prepares national standards. Bahrain is an IEC associate member and participates in IECEE. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 (safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems, general requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (inverter requirements) represent the international safety baseline expected by EWA-approved consultants, project owners, and insurers. Public sources do not confirm a single mandatory whole-product inverter import certificate, but EWA material-approval listing is the operative gate for net-metering and grid-connected installations.
summary.zh: 巴林标准机构——巴林工业与商业部（MOIC）下属的巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）——采用海湾合作委员会（GCC）标准化组织（GSO）颁布的GCC标准，或制定国家标准。巴林是IEC准成员并参与IECEE。对于并网光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1（光伏发电系统用电力变换器安全要求——通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆变器要求）是EWA认可顾问、项目业主和保险方期望的国际安全基准。公开资料未确认存在单一强制整机进口证书，但EWA物料认可备案是净计量和并网装置的实际准入关口。
summary.zht: 巴林標準機構——巴林工業與商業部（MOIC）下屬的巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）——採用海灣合作委員會（GCC）標準化組織（GSO）頒布的GCC標準，或制定國家標準。巴林是IEC準成員並參與IECEE。對於併網光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1（光伏發電系統用電力變換器安全要求——通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆變器要求）是EWA認可顧問、項目業主和保險方期望的國際安全基準。公開資料未確認存在單一強制整機進口證書，但EWA物料認可備案是淨計量和併網裝置的實際准入關口。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements)
IEC 62109-2:2011 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters)
BSMD / GSO standards adoption process (MOIC, Kingdom of Bahrain)

summary.en: China solar PV inverter files commonly include GB/T 37408-2019 (technical specifications for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters) and GB/T 19964-2024 (technical requirements for connecting photovoltaic power stations to power systems). These China documents can support technical due diligence but do not replace BSMD standards confirmation, EWA material-approval listing, or a project-owner or insurer request for IEC 62109-numbered test reports.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）和GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）。这些中国文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代BSMD标准确认、EWA物料认可备案，或项目业主及保险方要求的IEC 62109编号测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2019（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）和GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）。這些中國文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代BSMD標準確認、EWA物料認可備案，或項目業主及保險方要求的IEC 62109編號測試報告。

gap.en: Confirm the exact Bahrain route by HS code, product configuration, installation type (net-metering, grid-connected, off-grid), and project specification. Obtain IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test reports from an accredited laboratory. Apply for EWA material-approval listing before supply to net-metering or grid-connected projects. Prepare a clause matrix showing where China GB/T test data maps to IEC 62109 requirements.
gap.zh: 应按HS编码、产品配置、安装类型（净计量、并网、离网）和项目规范确认具体巴林路径。从认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试报告。在向净计量或并网项目供货前申请EWA物料认可备案。准备显示中国GB/T测试数据如何映射至IEC 62109要求的条款矩阵。
gap.zht: 應按HS編碼、產品配置、安裝類型（淨計量、併網、離網）和項目規範確認具體巴林路徑。從認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試報告。在向淨計量或併網項目供貨前申請EWA物料認可備案。準備顯示中國GB/T測試數據如何映射至IEC 62109要求的條款矩陣。

mandatory_status.target: EWA material-approval listing is mandatory for inverters used in net-metering and grid-connected installations in Bahrain; IEC 62109 evidence is expected by EWA-approved consultants, project owners, and insurers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 and GB/T 19964-2024 are recommended standards; compliance may be required by project, grid operator, or contract

source.publisher: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD), Ministry of Industry and Commerce

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat BSMD as the standards-screening gate and obtain IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 accredited-lab reports. Apply for EWA material-approval listing before supplying inverters to Bahrain net-metering or grid-connected projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将BSMD作为标准筛查关口，并取得IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2认可实验室报告。在向巴林净计量或并网项目供应逆变器前申请EWA物料认可备案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將BSMD作為標準篩查關口，並取得IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2認可實驗室報告。在向巴林淨計量或併網項目供應逆變器前申請EWA物料認可備案。
